title: IIT Patna Notification 2026 - Apply for Various Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of various Junior Research Fellow positions. Candidates who have qualified in the M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the IIT Patna Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the last date of application. If you are ...
